description: Add a Pro Value Prop section to the homepage and create a StickyUpgradeNudge component for calculator pages. Both features promote the Pro subscription.
steps: HOMEPAGE PRO SECTION: In app/page.tsx, add a new section between the Calculator Categories section (the bg-slate-50 section with 'Browse by Category') and the Affiliate Partners section (the bg-[#0A0F1E] section with 'Ready to Take Action?'). Insert a visually distinct Pro value prop section.
The Pro section should have: bg-white with a subtle emerald gradient card, heading 'Do More With Pro', subheading 'Upgrade for detailed reports, unlimited lookups, and premium features'.

Display a 2x3 grid of Pro features using icons from lucide-react: (1) PDF Report Export (FileText icon), (2) Unlimited Calculations (Calculator icon), (3) Rooftop Solar Analysis - 30 lookups/day (Sun icon), (4) Neighborhood Score - full details (MapPin icon), (5) Landed Cost Reports - unlimited (Ship icon), (6) Ad-Free Experience (ShieldOff icon).
Include price '$4.99/month' and a CTA button 'Upgrade Now' linking to /pricing. Use emerald accent colors consistent with the site design system.
STICKY UPGRADE NUDGE: Create components/premium/StickyUpgradeNudge.tsx as a 'use client' component.
The component shows as a thin sticky bar at the bottom of the viewport (fixed position, bottom-0, z-40).

It must only render when: (a) user is NOT Pro (use useProStatus() hook), (b) user has performed a calculation (accept a prop like `show: boolean` that the parent calculator controls), (c) not dismissed in current session (use sessionStorage key 'costsmart_nudge_dismissed').

Design: small shadow-lg, bg-white border-t border-emerald-100, flex layout with text 'Get a PDF report of this calculation + unlimited usage' and a CTA button 'Upgrade to Pro' with ArrowRight icon linking to /pricing. Include a dismiss X button.

Add StickyUpgradeNudge to these calculator pages by importing it: app/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx, app/rent-vs-buy-calculator/page.tsx, app/in/emi-calculator/page.tsx, app/in/sip-calculator/page.tsx, app/in/income-tax-calculator/page.tsx, app/retirement-calculator/page.tsx, app/loan-calculator/page.tsx. Since these are server component pages, wrap the StickyUpgradeNudge in a client component wrapper or pass show={true} as a static prop (the component itself handles Pro check and session dismissal internally - so pass show={true} always and let the component handle visibility logic).
acceptance_criteria: Homepage (app/page.tsx) contains a new 'Do More With Pro' section between calculator categories and partner offers
The Pro section shows 6 feature items in a grid with icons, pricing, and CTA to /pricing
components/premium/StickyUpgradeNudge.tsx exists as a 'use client' component
StickyUpgradeNudge uses useProStatus() to hide for Pro users
StickyUpgradeNudge is imported into at least 7 calculator page files
npx next build succeeds without errors
verification: Run `npx next build` and confirm it completes without errors
